user_goal: 实现 fixture/mock-first 的 Global ETF Momentum 回测 MVP，包含 Python package、CI、fixture 数据、策略信号、T+1 Open 月度回测、风险检查、JSON/Markdown 报告、Python workflow E2E 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network guard tests。

evaluator_feedback.summary: Independent Evaluator ran B006 F008 L1 verification. pytest, ruff, compileall, and mypy passed. Fixture workflow E2E generated JSON/Markdown reports with T close signal, T+1 open execution, data_snapshot_id, parameter_hash, PM-compatible output, and risk flags. No-live/no-secret/no-network/no-broker/no-AI-trade guards passed.

generator_handoff: Generator completed F001-F007. Added Python package/CI, committed synthetic fixture data and loader, Global ETF Momentum signal generation, monthly T-close/T+1-open backtest, risk checks and PM-compatible output, JSON/Markdown reports, fixture workflow E2E, and no-live/no-secret/no-network/no-broker/no-AI-trade guard tests. Local .venv was created with uv because system Python lacks pip/ensurepip. Full local checks now pass: .venv/bin/python -m pytest, .venv/bin/python -m ruff check ., .venv/bin/python -m compileall trade tests, and .venv/bin/python -m mypy --install-types --non-interactive trade. Evaluator should run F008 L1 verification and inspect generated report fields and guard coverage.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-12: B006 planning opened after user agreed with CI/testing decision. B006 is implementation batch for Global ETF Backtest MVP. Decision: CI yes, CD no, Vitest no, browser E2E no, Python workflow E2E yes. Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-12: F001-F007 completed and status moved to verifying for F008. Installed uv locally and created .venv to work around missing system pip/ensurepip. Full local checks pass: pytest, ruff, compileall, and mypy. Evaluator should inspect guard/report behavior and independently verify F008.
